arts.ttl: Report: Tottenham could actually sign £20m striker instead of Randal Kolo Muani
‘Awful’: Chris Sutton says Kai Havertz should be banned after what he did vs Man Utd
arts.sum: Arsenal lost to Manchester United in the FA Cup at the weekend, but, once again, most of the headlines after the game were about the...

arts.ttl: Arsenal star has already revealed what dressing room makes of Mikel Arteta transfer plan
arts.sum: Kieran Tierney may have already shed light on what the Arsenal dressing room thinks of Mikel Arteta's move for Martin Zubimendi, by calling the Real Sociedad midfielder "world class". While the Gunners would prefer an immediate transfer, Real Sociedad, who Arteta, Martin Odegaard, Mikel Merino, and Tierney all have played for in the past, will not let him leave until the end of the season.

arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola and Arne Slot's views on Arsenal-bound Martin Zubimendi says everything
arts.sum: After rejecting Liverpool last summer, the Euro 2024 winner will soon form a midfield partnership with Declan Rice - though he'll remain at Real Sociedad for the remainder of this season. Having given teams like City and Liverpool a run for their money in recent seasons, Zubimendi will be aiming to add the boost Arsenal need to finally realise their Premier League title aspirations.

arts.ttl: Why Raheem Sterling is complicating Arsenal's January transfer plans amid Premier League rules
arts.sum: Mikel Arteta has made it clear that any new signings in the January transfer window must be ready to make an immediate impact at Arsenal. With another key player in Gabriel Jesus missing from his attacking line-up, the focus on Raheem Sterling's role at the club becomes even more intense.

arts.ttl: Every word Mikel Arteta said on January transfers, Kai Havertz support and injury news
arts.sum: Yeah obviously, it's the most challenging period that we’ve had, especially because we lost very important players in crucial moments but things happen for a reason in this life and we have to adapt and still look how the team performs. We need to understand that a player can bring a lot to a team in different ways, it’s not just about that.

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta perfect in Kai Havertz defence as I watched Arsenal critics' hypocrisy laid bare - Tom Canton
arts.sum: Arteta walked into the room, and sat at his desk with a stern look ready to face questions over the latest on Gabriel Jesus, other players' statuses, the January transfer window and, of course, Kai Havertz. Although my time in this role remains relatively young, I have been in enough Mikel Arteta press conferences to get a sense of the mood when the Arsenal manager enters the room at the Sobha Realty Training Centre.

arts.ttl: Arsenal confirm Gabriel Jesus injury diagnosis
arts.sum: Arsenal confirm Gabriel Jesus has suffered an ACL injury.

arts.ttl: Report: Randal Kolo Muani has now finally decided whether he will join Tottenham or Juventus on loan
arts.sum: 🚨BREAKING: Randal Kolo Muani has decided his next move 🛫

arts.ttl: Spanish press warn Arsenal not to make the same mistake as Liverpool in move for Martin Zubimendi
arts.sum: Only six months after Liverpool failed to conclude a deal for Martin Zubimendi, Arsenal are now said to have agreed a deal to sign the...
